mapper.sql: id, buy_contract_id, buy_product_id, buy_price, buy_user_id, buy_user_name, buy_date, sell_contract_id, sell_product_id, sell_price, sell_user_id, sell_user_name, sell_date, stock_detail_id, deal_number, product_name, product_cd, brand_number, factory_id, factory_name, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, created_date, updated_date, enterprise_id, buy_company_id, buy_company_name, sell_company_id, sell_company_name
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_ctr_contract_rela
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_ctr_contract_rela (id, buy_contract_id, buy_product_id, buy_price, buy_user_id, buy_user_name, buy_date, sell_contract_id, sell_product_id, sell_price, sell_user_id, sell_user_name, sell_date, stock_detail_id, deal_number, product_name, product_cd, brand_number, factory_id, factory_name, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, created_date, updated_date, enterprise_id, buy_company_id, buy_company_name, sell_company_id, sell_company_name) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{buyContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{buyProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{buyPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{buyUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{buyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sellContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sellProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sellPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{sellUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sellUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stockDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dealNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brandNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{factoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{factoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{enterpriseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{buyCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{buyCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sellCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

update t_ctr_contract_rela
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_contract_id = #{record.buyContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_product_id = #{record.buyProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_price = #{record.buyPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
buy_user_id = #{record.buyUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_user_name = #{record.buyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
buy_date = #{record.buyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sell_contract_id = #{record.sellContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sell_product_id = #{record.sellProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sell_price = #{record.sellPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
sell_user_id = #{record.sellUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sell_user_name = #{record.sellUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sell_date = #{record.sellDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
stock_detail_id = #{record.stockDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deal_number = #{record.dealNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
product_name = #{record.productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_cd = #{record.productCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
brand_number = #{record.brandNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
factory_id = #{record.factoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
factory_name = #{record.factoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_id = #{record.warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_date = #{record.createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_date = #{record.updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
enterprise_id = #{record.enterpriseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_company_id = #{record.buyCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_company_name = #{record.buyCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sell_company_id = #{record.sellCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sell_company_name = #{record.sellCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update t_ctr_contract_rela set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_contract_id = #{record.buyContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_product_id = #{record.buyProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_price = #{record.buyPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, buy_user_id = #{record.buyUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_user_name = #{record.buyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, buy_date = #{record.buyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sell_contract_id = #{record.sellContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sell_product_id = #{record.sellProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sell_price = #{record.sellPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, sell_user_id = #{record.sellUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sell_user_name = #{record.sellUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sell_date = #{record.sellDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, stock_detail_id = #{record.stockDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deal_number = #{record.dealNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, product_name = #{record.productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_cd = #{record.productCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brand_number = #{record.brandNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, factory_id = #{record.factoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, factory_name = #{record.factoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_id = #{record.warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_date = #{record.createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_date = #{record.updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, enterprise_id = #{record.enterpriseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_company_id = #{record.buyCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_company_name = #{record.buyCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sell_company_id = #{record.sellCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sell_company_name = #{record.sellCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update t_ctr_contract_rela
buy_contract_id = #{buyContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_product_id = #{buyProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_price = #{buyPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
buy_user_id = #{buyUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_user_name = #{buyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
buy_date = #{buyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sell_contract_id = #{sellContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sell_product_id = #{sellProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sell_price = #{sellPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
sell_user_id = #{sellUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sell_user_name = #{sellUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sell_date = #{sellDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
stock_detail_id = #{stockDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deal_number = #{dealNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_cd = #{productCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
brand_number = #{brandNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
factory_id = #{factoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
factory_name = #{factoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_id = #{warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_date = #{updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_company_id = #{buyCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_company_name = #{buyCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sell_company_id = #{sellCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sell_company_name = #{sellCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_ctr_contract_rela set buy_contract_id = #{buyContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_product_id = #{buyProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_price = #{buyPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, buy_user_id = #{buyUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_user_name = #{buyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, buy_date = #{buyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sell_contract_id = #{sellContractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sell_product_id = #{sellProductId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sell_price = #{sellPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, sell_user_id = #{sellUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sell_user_name = #{sellUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sell_date = #{sellDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, stock_detail_id = #{stockDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deal_number = #{dealNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_cd = #{productCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brand_number = #{brandNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, factory_id = #{factoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, factory_name = #{factoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_date = #{updatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_company_id = #{buyCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, buy_company_name = #{buyCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sell_company_id = #{sellCompanyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sell_company_name = #{sellCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
